2183360.name: ROOT
2183360.description:
1. Beautiful graphics and deep story

In the distant ancient times, there was a great war between the three races of humans, dwarves, and undead. It was a long and great war that could not be won or lost even after human generations changed several times and the world was irreparably devastated.

When the three races saw the world destroyed to the point of imminent end, a peace treaty was signed, and in order to reclaim the world before it was destroyed, they began a time travel project to prevent war from happening.

A technological city of humans in charge of making time machines and nurturing time travelers who can handle time machines.
A smelting city of dwarves in charge of manufacturing time machine parts.
A magical city of human wizards and undead, who decided to process and provide mana stones, the material of the time machine and the energy source of all technologies.
Each race built their own city, cooperated with each other for a long time, and endured numerous failures and trials and errors together, immersed in the project, and finally reached the final stage of the project.

Now, the situation ends when the Smelting City and the Magic City send only the key parts and fuel of the time machine to the Technology City, but all of a sudden, all contact with the Smelting City and the Magic City is cut off, and the promised goods do not come, and the project is in danger of being canceled.

The main character is a project manager and preliminary time traveler in the Tech City. He is tasked with going to the Smelting City and the Magic City to get parts and fuel from the city's head, the warden.

The main character who receives the mission immediately completes some preparations in the city, and then heads to the nearest smelting city.

However, due to the aftermath of the war in the past, monsters that went crazy attacked everywhere, the head of the smelting city lost parts and left it unattended, and various problems in the smelting city caught the main character's ankles, so it was difficult to carry out the mission. will have difficulties
The situation was tightly twisted from the first step of the journey. The protagonist must somehow solve the situation, find parts and raw materials to complete the project.


2. Various combat systems
You can enjoy colorful play with 3 classes and 60 unique skills.

About 40 monsters with distinct personalities are prepared for each region and each region, so you can always experience new battles without getting tired.


3. Various growth systems
Each player can play individually with various systems including various equipment such as weapons, items, accessories, auxiliary weapons, life level, resource gathering, gems, enchantments, player stats, and more than 380 various items.

Various living levels and resource gathering such as crafting, cooking, alchemy, gathering, mining, hunting, etc.

Enchant that can give the desired stat to the desired equipment


There are gems and various items that make other weapons and equipment more powerful.
